case_title: STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY VS. CHRISTOPHER HARRISON et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-13-2006 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE AUG-04-2006 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-13-2006 CONTINUED TO NOV-15-2006 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. SEP-13-2006 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HARRISON, CHRISTOPHER JONES, TERRELL JACOBY $2,287.64 PRINCIPAL, $249.92 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,537.56, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
